title: quesnelia tubifolia
intro: Quesnelia tubifolia, also known as the 'Tubular Air Plant', is a species of epiphytic bromeliad native to South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Quesnelia tubifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Quesnelia tubifolia can be prepared into teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
